title: [spec-compliance] SenML Content-Format swapped in 07-transport-app.md
description: spec/07-transport-app.md:357 lists 110 for application/senml+cbor but RFC 8428+appendix-senml.md+lichen-coap/option.rs:33+SCHC vectors use 112 (and 60 for cbor). codec.rs:482 and tests match correct value. MUST fix table and cross-refs. See subagent review project-LICHEN-eer0.
